# CMakeLists.txt for fast-float (source build)
# This file is a placeholder.
# fast-float has its own CMake build system.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.22.1)
project(wazuh_ext_fast_float NONE)

message(STATUS "This CMakeLists.txt (src/engine/external/fast-float/CMakeLists.txt) is a placeholder. fast-float's own CMake script is used directly.")
